name: Baked Beefy Tomato Rigatoni (Rr)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rump roast, shredded and cooked
1 pound pasta, rigatoni, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Heat olive oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the tomatoes and their liquid, bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Add the meat, salt, and red pepper flakes; simmer for 5 more minutes.
Toss the sauce with the cooked pasta. Transfer to an ovenproof casserole dish about 15 x 10 x 2 inches. Top with the cheese.
Bake for 25 minutes, until the cheese is lightly browned and the pasta is heated through.
Serve with a lightly dressed green salad and garlic toast. Follow with brandied figs.
NOTES: By Judi Moseley (judi@moseleygroup.com) on Jan 4, 1998.
